zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicola de Gaunt於1250年出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆時，她的父親Gilbert de Gaunt31歲，母親Lora de Baliol30歲。她於大約1273年與Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年在英國越可爾塔德卡斯特享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾塔德卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicola de Gaunt于1250年出生在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆时，她的父亲Gilbert de Gaunt31岁，母亲Lora de Baliol30岁。她于大约1273年与Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年在英国越可爾塔德卡斯特享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾塔德卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gauntt
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Gaunt  .

nameMeanings.name: Nicola
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Niccolò
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicola de Gaunt was born in 1250, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Gilbert de Gaunt, was 31 and her mother, Lora de Baliol, was 30. She married Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster about 1273. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1284, in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicola de Gaunt est née en 1250, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Gaunt, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lora de Baliol, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster environ 1273. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1284, à Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicola de Gaunt 1250 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Gaunt 31 und ihre Mutter Lora de Baliol 30. Sie hat um 1273 Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1284 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicola de Gaunt è nata il nel 1250 nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Gilbert de Gaunt, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lora de Baliol, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster circa 1273. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1284, nel Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicola de Gauntが1250年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Gauntは31歳，母Lora de Baliolは30歳であった。約1273年にSir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年にイギリスヨークシュアイアタドカスターで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアタドカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicola de Gaunt(이)가 1250년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Gaunt(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lora de Baliol(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1273년 Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 요르크실르 타드카스터에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 타드카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicola de Gaunt nasceu em 1250, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Gaunt, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lora de Baliol, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster aproximadamente 1273. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1284, em Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicola de Gaunt родилась в 1250 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Gaunt было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lora de Baliol, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster около 1273 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1284 г. в местности тадкастир, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicola de Gaunt nació en 1250, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Gaunt, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lora de Baliol, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster aproximadamente 1273. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1284, en Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
